scripts.setup: pnpm --dir client install && cd agent && uv sync
scripts.dev:agent:pipeline: pnpm prompts:check && cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=pipeline uv run python main.py dev
scripts.dev:agent:realtime: pnpm prompts:check && cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=realtime AGENT_ROLE=dominant uv run python main.py dev
scripts.dev:agent:realtime:collaborative: pnpm prompts:check && cd agent && AGENT_WORKER_MODE=realtime AGENT_ROLE=collaborative uv run python main.py dev
